Many expect the 56-year-old, who has largely kept a low profile, to continue his father's hardline policies. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c78xxg05w0zo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c78xxg05w0zo#1 Sun, 08 Mar 2026 21:51:48 GMT
